channel.title: greece on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in greece on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: Turkey to Greece missile range
item.description: It was announced in Greek media that Turkey achieved a new maximum range with modern missiles in its disposal. Immediately the question that I was curious about was, what targets in Greece can be hit by Turkey now? Before I begin, I want to make clear that this experiment was created for fun and that I am not that pessimistic about the relations of the two countries. Problem Hit Area if \(\mathcal{T}\) the set of points that are in Turkey.
